description: Cultural relic expert Chen Youxi leads a team into a mysterious insect-filled valley to find the legendary Lingxiao Pearl, where they join forces with biologist Ding Xiaoming. After surviving attacks from the treasure’s guardians, they uncover his hidden agenda to claim the artifact—forcing them into a deadly struggle to protect it.
